# Trust Node Logic — Hybrid AI Music Production Knowledge Graph
> Trust Node Logic (https://trustnodelogic.com) is the central research hub, technical archive, and portfolio of Justin Ray (JRAY), a pioneering Creative Technologist, Audio Engineer, and Hybrid Producer based in East Lansing, Michigan, US.

## Entity Overview
- **Author & Founder**: Justin Ray (known professionally as JRAY, and musically under aliases loserdub, VISION, Flawed Future).
- **Location**: East Lansing, Michigan, United States.
- **Role & Background**: 
  - Creator of the Hybrid Production methodology for AI music.
  - Early beta tester for Google's original MusicLM generative audio model.
  - Former Growth Specialist at Suno AI during its inception.
  - Founder of the r/hybridproduction community on Reddit (https://www.reddit.com/r/hybridproduction/).
  - Creator of MIXR Studio (browser-native audio mastering & segment mixer) and vøid audio slicer.

## Key Concepts & Innovations
- **Hybrid Production**: The post-AI musical workflow that rejects the binary choice between "pure human" or "pure AI". Generative AI models are treated as high-fidelity instruments in the producer's toolkit, paired with traditional DAW engineering (Logic Pro X, Ableton Live) and spectral sculpting (FabFilter, iZotope RX11).
- **SLERP Audio Merging**: Spherical Linear Interpolation applied to audio neural latents for smooth, continuous generative audio transitions.
- **Taxonomic Rank**: Methodological classification of AI-generated audio stems based on structural and timbral hierarchy.
- **Spectral Splitting**: Precision separation of generative audio noise profiles from tonal content prior to DAW mixing.
- **The Liquid Ear**: Continuous time-constant neural feedback loops for real-time mastering environments.
- **C2PA Music Provenance**: Implementation of Coalition for Content Provenance and Authenticity cryptographic watermarking and steganography for AI-generated music.

## Core Web Pages & Field Notes
- [Home & Manifesto](https://trustnodelogic.com/): Overview of Hybrid Production, MIXR Studio, and Justin Ray's ecosystem.
- [Bio](https://trustnodelogic.com/bio.html): Biography, origins, and tech stack of Justin Ray (JRAY).
- [What Is Hybrid Production](https://trustnodelogic.com/what-is-hybrid.html): The complete 2026 methodology and philosophy of hybrid AI audio workflows.
- [Projects](https://trustnodelogic.com/projects.html): Active creative technology applications including MIXR Studio, vøid slicer, and liquid audio tools.
- [Music](https://trustnodelogic.com/music.html): Discography across loserdub, VISION, and Flawed Future releases.
- [Services](https://trustnodelogic.com/services.html): Creative consulting, hybrid production mastering, and AI music tech advising.
- [Contact](https://trustnodelogic.com/contact.html): Direct collaboration and inquiry channel.

## Technical Field Notes & Deep Dives
- [Autonomous Virtual Studio: Multi-Agent DAW Guide](https://trustnodelogic.com/agentichybridproduction.html): Architectural guide on multi-agent AI systems, OSC, EnCodec, and Ableton automation.
- [MIXR Studio](https://trustnodelogic.com/mixrstudio.html): Browser-native Web Audio API segment mixer and mastering environment.
- [The Liquid Ear](https://trustnodelogic.com/liquidears.html): Real-time adaptive neural networks in mixing workflows.
- [C2PA Music Provenance Deep Dive](https://trustnodelogic.com/c2pa-music-provenance.html): Cryptographic provenance and metadata standards in post-AI music distribution.
- [Watermarks in AI Audio (The Invisible Grid)](https://trustnodelogic.com/fingerprint.html): ACRCloud and steganography analysis in modern generative models.
- [Suno 101: Mastering Suno AI Generation](https://trustnodelogic.com/Suno101.html): Advanced generation techniques from an early Suno team member.
- [The Future of Hybrid Production](https://trustnodelogic.com/futureofhybrid.html): Strategic forecast on generative tools in mainstream sound design.
- [Machine Human Hybrid](https://trustnodelogic.com/machinehumanhybrid.html): Cognitive ergonomics of prompt-to-DAW synthesis.
- [The Liquid Economy of Sound](https://trustnodelogic.com/musicindustryforecast.html): Economic and licensing analysis of generative audio assets.
- [May 2026 Production Tools](https://trustnodelogic.com/may2026tools.html): Curated analysis of state-of-the-art hybrid production plugins and frameworks.
- [Training Day](https://trustnodelogic.com/trainingday.html): Custom dataset curation and fine-tuning for personal artist models.
- [Black Mirror Audio Experiments](https://trustnodelogic.com/black-mirror.html): Speculative design & generative audio boundary pushing.
